blocks.text: Match preview: Ireland Women face West Indies Women in 1st ODI (ODI) on Fri, 10 Jul, 2026, 3:15 pm at Bready Cricket Club Bready, Northern Ireland. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Ireland Women vs West Indies Women
West Indies Women tour of Ireland, 2026
Bready Cricket Club Bready, Northern Ireland

blocks.text: Standard ODI surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 250–290 runs par score.
Overcast · High 21°C / Low 13°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 20 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
